channel.title: Nordic Pulp & Paper Research Journal
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Nordic Pulp & Paper Research Journal

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Chang Woo Jeong, Yong Ju Lee, Yun Chang Shin, Mi Jung Choi, Hyoung Jin Kim DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-frontmatter4

item.title: Evaluation of oxygen delignified fibers with high water absorbency, as a greener alternative to fully bleached fibers for tissue paper
item.description: Article by Chang Woo Jeong, Yong Ju Lee, Yun Chang Shin, Mi Jung Choi, Hyoung Jin Kim DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0024

item.title: Effects of partial lignin extraction on rheological characteristics and combustion performance of high solids bamboo kraft black liquor
item.description: Article by Chang Woo Jeong, Yong Ju Lee, Yun Chang Shin, Mi Jung Choi, Hyoung Jin Kim DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0003

item.title: A preliminary investigation of banana pseudo-stem (Musa cavendish) for pulp and paper production: morphology, chemical composition, FTIR, XRD and thermogravimetric analysis
item.description: Article by Chang Woo Jeong, Yong Ju Lee, Yun Chang Shin, Mi Jung Choi, Hyoung Jin Kim DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0043

item.title: Development of fibre properties in mill scale: high- and low consistency refining of thermomechanical pulp (part 2) – Importance of fibre curl
item.description: Article by Chang Woo Jeong, Yong Ju Lee, Yun Chang Shin, Mi Jung Choi, Hyoung Jin Kim DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0049

item.description: Article by Chang Woo Jeong, Yong Ju Lee, Yun Chang Shin, Mi Jung Choi, Hyoung Jin Kim DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2023-0095

item.title: Paper fingerprint by forming fabric: analysis of periodic marks with 2D lab formation sensor and machine learning for forensic paper-identification
item.description: Article by Chang Woo Jeong, Yong Ju Lee, Yun Chang Shin, Mi Jung Choi, Hyoung Jin Kim DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0050
